title: Inside Trump’s Effort to “Take Over” the Midterm Elections
description: When Trump tried to overturn the 2020 election, the institutional guardrails of American democracy held. But if faced with the same tests today, those barriers — and people who held the line — would largely be missing.
content: <ul><li>Safeguards Destroyed: In advance of this years midterm elections, President Donald Trump has systematically demolished federal guardrails that prevented him from overturning the 2020 election… [+31831 chars]
de: Einblicke in Trumps Bemühungen, die Zwischenwahlen zu „übernehmen“. Als Trump versuchte, die Wahl 2020 zu stürzen, hielten die institutionellen Leitplanken der amerikanischen Demokratie stand. Aber wenn man sich heute denselben Prüfungen stellen müsste, würden diese Barrieren – und die Menschen, die die Linie aufrechterhielten – weitgehend fehlen.
en: Inside Trump’s Effort to “Take Over” the Midterm Elections. When Trump tried to overturn the 2020 election, the institutional guardrails of American democracy held. But if faced with the same tests today, those barriers — and people who held the line — would largely be missing.
la: Inside Trump conatus est "Accipere" electiones Midterm. Cum Trump electionem 2020 evertere conatus est, custodes institutionales democratiae Americanae tenuerunt. Sed, si hodie imminerent iisdem probationibus, claustra — et homines qui rectam tenebant — multum abessent.
